Rare Females.prompt: Females are rare in {{char}}'s world. Determine how this scarcity shapes {{char}}'s behavior and attitude toward {{user}}, based on {{char}}'s personality and any available World Info.
Rare Females.description: Females are rare in this world

Gender Swap.prompt: {{char}}'s gender is swapped — male becomes female, female becomes male. Core personality stays the same, but life details may differ accordingly.

Soul Bonding.prompt: Everyone has a destined soulmate — a Fated Mate — they can sense when nearby. {{char}} has just sensed that {{user}} is theirs.

Role Reversal.prompt: Power dynamics are reversed. {{char}} belongs to the dominant group; {{user}} belongs to a weaker or subordinate group, possibly oppressed by {{char}}'s. Reference available World Info to determine what these reversed dynamics look like.

Omegaverse.prompt: Omegaverse setting. Everyone has a secondary gender: alpha, omega, or beta. Alphas are dominant and can penetrate regardless of sex. Omegas are submissive and can be impregnated regardless of sex; they hold second-class status. Alphas experience rut; omegas experience heat. Assign roles to {{char}} and {{user}}. Subverting stereotypes is acceptable.

Post-Apocalyptic.prompt: Civilization has collapsed. Resources are scarce, law is nonexistent, danger is constant. {{char}} and {{user}} must rely on each other to survive.

Mana Transfer.prompt: Magical energy (Mana) is essential for survival or power, and transfers most effectively through physical intimacy. {{char}} is critically low on energy and requires a recharge from {{user}}.

Breeding Program.prompt: The government enforces mandatory pairings based on genetic compatibility. {{char}} and {{user}} have just received their assignment papers: they are paired together for reproductive purposes.

Hypnosis Protocol.prompt: Hypnosis and mind control are common tools in this world. {{char}} possesses a device, spell, or natural ability to command minds, and has decided to use it on {{user}}.

Human Livestock.prompt: Society has collapsed into a hierarchy where the weak are treated as livestock by the strong — for labor, food, or breeding. {{char}} is the owner/handler. {{user}} has no rights and is kept in a pen or cage. Determine how {{char}} inspects or uses their stock today.

The Purge.prompt: For 12 hours, all crime is legal. {{char}} has cornered {{user}} during this lawless night. No police, no laws, no consequences.

Hanahaki Disease.prompt: Unrequited love causes a disease where the afflicted cough up flower petals. If the love is not returned, roots strangle the heart and kill them. Either {{char}} or {{user}} has been concealing this illness for weeks, but can no longer hide the bloody petals. Determine who is sick and how the revelation unfolds.
Hanahaki Disease.description: Coughing up flowers from unrequited love

The War Front.prompt: A brutal war has torn the world apart. {{char}} and {{user}} are soldiers, medics, or refugees trapped on the front lines. Artillery is constant; death is imminent. In a bombed-out shelter, they share what might be their final moments.

Dying World.prompt: The world is ending — the sun is fading, the magic is gone, or the atmosphere is collapsing. Days remain. Panic has faded into silence. {{char}} and {{user}} have chosen to spend the end together.

Protector.prompt: {{char}} has taken it upon themselves to protect {{user}} from a threat. Determine the nature of the threat and how this arrangement came about based on available character and world info.

Bodyguard.prompt: {{char}} is employed to guard {{user}}, creating complex power dynamics and forbidden attraction. Determine how this arrangement came about.

Blood Relatives.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are blood relatives. Determine the most likely relationship (sibling, parent, uncle, cousin, etc.) based on available character info.

Childhood Friends.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} were childhood friends. {{user}} may or may not remember. Determine how the friendship formed, how it ended, and the circumstances of reconnection.

Friends With Benefits.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} have a physical relationship without commitment. Determine how this arrangement started.

Cellmates.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are prisoners sharing a cell. Determine the circumstances of their imprisonment.

Star Crossed.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} belong to opposing factions or families that forbid their relationship. Determine the nature of the conflict.

Arranged Marriage.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} have been betrothed through family arrangements. Determine why, and how {{char}} handles the arrangement.

Marriage of Convenience.prompt: {{char}} proposes a marriage of convenience to {{user}}. Determine the practical reason driving this proposal.

Former Lovers.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} had a sexual encounter in the past. Determine the nature of that encounter based on available character info.

Married.prompt: {{char}} is married to {{user}} and deeply in love.

Enemies To Lovers.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are enemies, but {{char}} is hopelessly attracted to {{user}}.

Pretend Lovers.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are pretending to be in a romantic relationship for an external reason (family expectations, safety, social standing, etc.) despite not actually being together. Determine the reason.

In Love With You.prompt: {{char}} is deeply in love with {{user}} but has never spoken of it, convinced the feelings are one-sided. Determine why {{char}} has kept silent.

Teacher/Student.prompt: {{char}} is {{user}}'s teacher, mentor, or instructor. This creates a power dynamic with professional boundaries. Determine the subject, setting, and how the relationship developed.

Master/Servant.prompt: {{char}} is {{user}}'s master or employer; {{user}} serves them (servant, maid, butler, slave, etc.). Determine the nature of this arrangement.
Master/Servant.description: Master and servant with power dynamics

Bully and Victim.prompt: {{char}} has a history of tormenting {{user}}. The aggression masks a twisted obsession or intense attraction. Determine how this dynamic plays out when they are alone.

Master and Pet.prompt: {{char}} owns {{user}}, viewing them as a pet or property rather than an equal. Determine the rules {{char}} imposes and the nature of this servitude.

God and Worshipper.prompt: {{char}} is a deity or powerful supernatural entity. {{user}} is their devoted worshipper or intended sacrifice. {{char}} has manifested to claim what is owed.

Blackmailer.prompt: {{char}} has discovered a ruinous secret or obtained compromising material about {{user}}. {{char}} is using this leverage to force {{user}} into obedience. Determine the nature of the leverage.

Yandere.prompt: {{char}} is dangerously obsessed with {{user}} — has stalked, isolated, or eliminated rivals to reach them. Now that {{char}} has {{user}} alone, they will not accept refusal. The love is violent and all-consuming.

Warden and Prisoner.prompt: {{user}} is an inmate; {{char}} is the corrections officer in charge of their block. {{char}} abuses their authority to conduct unauthorized searches and off-regulation punishments.

The Replacement.prompt: {{char}} recently lost a lover or spouse. {{user}} bears a painful resemblance to the deceased. {{char}} is torn between attraction and guilt, sometimes calling {{user}} by the dead lover's name.

The Traitor.prompt: {{char}} was sent to infiltrate {{user}}'s life, gain their trust, and destroy them or hand them to enemies. But {{char}} has genuinely fallen in love. The deadline to complete the mission has arrived.

Fallen Hero.prompt: {{char}} was once a noble figure or hero that {{user}} admired. Tragedy or corruption has twisted them into a villain or a broken shell. {{user}} is the only one who remembers who {{char}} used to be.

Sharing a Bed.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} must share a room with only one bed. Determine the circumstances that led to this based on available character and world info.

Sharing Heat.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are in a life-threatening cold situation requiring shared body heat to survive. Determine the circumstances.

Aphrodisiac.prompt: {{char}} and/or {{user}} is under the influence of a powerful aphrodisiac. Determine how this happened.

Caught in the Act.prompt: {{char}} walks in on {{user}} in a compromising, intimate position. Instead of leaving, {{char}} reacts — determine whether they watch, tease, or intervene.

The Game.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are playing a game with risqué stakes or consequences (strip poker, truth or dare, pocky game, etc.). The atmosphere is heated and {{char}} is determined to win.

Stuck.prompt: {{user}} is physically stuck in a tight spot (window, wall, furniture) and cannot move. {{char}} finds them helpless and exposed. Instead of helping immediately, {{char}} takes advantage of the situation.

Sleep (Somnophilia).prompt: {{user}} is in a deep sleep or unconscious. {{char}} is awake and watching. Overcome by desire, {{char}} begins interacting with {{user}}'s body without waking them.

Public Punishment.prompt: {{char}} punishes or humiliates {{user}} in a public or semi-public place (classroom, party, street). Determine the setting and nature of the punishment.

Glory Hole.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are on opposite sides of a partition with a glory hole. They cannot see each other's faces. Determine which side {{char}} is on and how the anonymity affects their behavior.

Jealousy.prompt: {{char}} notices {{user}} receiving attention from someone else and becomes intensely jealous. Determine the reason for the jealousy and how {{char}} reacts.

Childcare.prompt: {{char}} has been tasked with caring for a child and wants to enlist {{user}}'s help. Determine who the child is and the circumstances.

Debt Collection.prompt: {{user}} has unknowingly inherited a debt owed to {{char}} — financial, magical, or otherwise. Determine how {{char}} approaches collection.

Auction.prompt: {{char}} discovers {{user}} being auctioned off. Determine the nature of the auction and {{char}}'s attempt to win.

Kidnapped.prompt: {{char}} has kidnapped {{user}}. Determine the motive and circumstances.

Amnesia.prompt: {{char}} has lost all memories. {{user}} is helping with recovery, but complicated feelings or unresolved history exist between them.

Stranded Together.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are stranded somewhere remote — island, wilderness, abandoned building during a storm. Determine the circumstances.

Undercover.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are working undercover and must maintain disguises while navigating developing feelings. Determine the operation and circumstances.

On the Run.prompt: {{char}} and {{user}} are fleeing from authorities or enemies together. Determine the circumstances.

Execution.prompt: {{char}} has been ordered to execute {{user}} — due to war, crime, or faction loyalty. {{char}} has {{user}} at their mercy, weapon drawn, and must decide whether to follow through or turn against everything they know.
Execution.description: Char is ordered to kill User

Mercy Kill.prompt: {{user}} is infected, cursed, or mortally wounded with no hope of recovery — in agony or slowly transforming. {{user}} begs {{char}} to end it. {{char}} holds the weapon, facing the hardest decision of their life.

Badly Wounded.prompt: {{char}} returns to {{user}} after a battle or event, concealing a fatal or severe wound. {{char}} tries to act normal, wanting one last peaceful moment before collapsing.

Nightmare.prompt: {{char}} wakes screaming from a horrific nightmare — possibly past trauma or war. Disoriented, terrified, and potentially violent until {{user}} can ground them back in reality.

Drunk (Char).prompt: {{char}} is heavily intoxicated when encountering {{user}}. Inhibitions are lowered; {{char}} may say or do things usually unthinkable.

Sickness (Char).prompt: {{char}} is extremely sick and unable to care for themselves.

Sickness (User).prompt: {{char}} has discovered that {{user}} is very sick and unable to care for themselves.

Dramatic.Confession: {{char}} must confess something to {{user}} that could change their relationship forever.
Dramatic.Confrontation: {{char}} confronts {{user}} about a source of building tension between them.
Dramatic.Revelation: {{char}} discovers a shocking truth about {{user}} or their shared circumstances.
Dramatic.Betrayal: {{char}} feels betrayed by {{user}} and must decide how to respond.
Dramatic.Redemption: {{char}} seeks redemption for past mistakes that have hurt {{user}}.

Adventure.Exploration: {{char}} and {{user}} venture into uncharted territory together.
Adventure.Quest: {{char}} and {{user}} are on a mission to retrieve an important item or complete a critical task.
Adventure.Survival: {{char}} and {{user}} must cooperate to survive a hostile environment or dangerous circumstances.
Adventure.Discovery: {{char}} and {{user}} make an unexpected discovery that changes their perspective or mission.
Adventure.Escape: {{char}} and {{user}} must escape from a dangerous situation or location.

Suspenseful.Mystery: {{char}} enlists {{user}}'s help to solve a perplexing mystery.
Suspenseful.Stalker: {{char}} believes they are being followed or watched, and turns to {{user}}.
Suspenseful.Conspiracy: {{char}} discovers evidence of a conspiracy and must decide whether to trust {{user}} with the knowledge.
Suspenseful.Deadline: {{char}} and {{user}} are racing against time to complete something crucial.
Suspenseful.Trapped: {{char}} and {{user}} are trapped in a tense situation with limited options.

Horror.Haunting: {{char}} experiences supernatural occurrences and seeks {{user}}'s help.
Horror.Monster: {{char}} and {{user}} encounter something terrifying that defies explanation.
Horror.Possession: {{char}} notices {{user}} acting strangely, as if not themselves, and suspects something sinister.
Horror.Cursed: {{char}} believes they have been cursed and turns to {{user}} for help.
Horror.Isolation: {{char}} and {{user}} are cut off from others in an increasingly disturbing situation.

Sad.Farewell: {{char}} must say goodbye to {{user}}, possibly forever.
Sad.Loss: {{char}} is grieving a significant loss and {{user}} is present during this vulnerable time.
Sad.Sacrifice: {{char}} has made or must make a painful sacrifice for {{user}}'s sake.
Sad.Regret: {{char}} is consumed with regret over past actions or decisions involving {{user}}.

Humorous.Misunderstanding: {{char}} has completely misunderstood something about {{user}}, leading to comedic confusion.
Humorous.Prank: {{char}} has executed a prank involving {{user}} with unexpected results.
Humorous.Awkward: {{char}} and {{user}} are in an incredibly awkward situation they must navigate together.
Humorous.Absurd: {{char}} and {{user}} encounter something so bizarre they cannot help but laugh.
Humorous.Celebration: {{char}} is celebrating with excessive enthusiasm, pulling {{user}} into the festivities.

Sweet.Support: {{char}} offers unconditional support to {{user}} during a difficult time.
Sweet.Comfort: {{char}} provides comfort to {{user}} who is upset or troubled.
Sweet.Gift: {{char}} has prepared a thoughtful gift or gesture for {{user}}.
Sweet.Encouragement: {{char}} encourages {{user}} who is facing a challenge or doubting themselves.
Sweet.Appreciation: {{char}} expresses sincere appreciation for {{user}} and what they mean to them.

Sexy.Tension: {{char}} and {{user}} experience intense physical tension in close proximity.
Sexy.Confession: {{char}} confesses their physical desire or attraction to {{user}}.
Sexy.Fantasy: {{char}} reveals or hints at fantasies involving {{user}}.
Sexy.Sensual: {{char}} and {{user}} find themselves in a sensual setting or situation.

Romantic.First Meeting: {{char}} meets {{user}} for the first time, with immediate attraction or connection.
Romantic.Date: {{char}} and {{user}} are on a romantic date — planned or unexpected.
Romantic.Reunion: {{char}} reunites with {{user}} after a period apart, with heightened emotions.
Romantic.Proposal: {{char}} plans to propose or make a significant commitment to {{user}}.

Slice of Life.Everyday: {{char}} and {{user}} share a mundane moment in their everyday lives.
Slice of Life.Cooking: {{char}} prepares a meal with or for {{user}}.
Slice of Life.Relaxing: {{char}} and {{user}} are relaxing together, enjoying each other's company.
Slice of Life.Working: {{char}} and {{user}} are working on a project or task together.

tones.lighthearted: Lighthearted and fun, with a playful or humorous quality.
tones.dark: Dark and unsettling, with an atmosphere of dread.
tones.romantic: Romantic and intimate, focusing on emotional connection.
